# Alan Gabriel Ascorti — Portfolio

> https://lemonsix.github.io/

## Summary

Software Architect · Domain-driven backends · Multitenant SaaS on Azure | Go

Software architect specialized in translating complex business domains — finance, compliance, healthcare, logistics, and operations — into scalable SaaS backends (multitenant platforms and single-tenant products).

Lead Developer at Contarg: (1) multitenant Go microservices platform on Azure — broker-dealers, compliance, tesorería, billing, healthcare, logistics, omnichannel; hexagonal architecture, row-level tenancy, event sourcing (subset), outbox for Meta APIs. (2) Alycs — separate single-tenant SaaS monolith (Go + Next.js), capital-markets integrations (Estudio Gallo, BYMA, Primary); not multitenant.

- SKILLS: technical, domain expertise, languages, certifications
